visualizerParams.title: Alternative String Concatenation Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The function is intended to alternate characters from two strings. However, it seems to be failing for certain input combinations or outputting extra characters. Find and fix the error in the character selection logic.

solution.explanation: While the buggy code works for the given example, it is inefficient because string concatenation in a loop is O(n^2) in some Python implementations due to string immutability. Using a list and `join()` is the idiomatic and more efficient O(n) approach.
